lift.warmup: General: 1–2 min band pull-aparts, scap push-ups, hip openers. Light ramp set before lat pulldown 160.
lift.cooldown: 2–3 min static stretch — lats, chest, biceps/triceps, calves.

flags: Seated calf 345 attempt (PM) gated on today's own AM Achilles read — hold 335 if sore/stiff (Adj #102/#113).
cardio.workout: 60 min Z1 long run: 5 min easy build, 50 min steady Z1, 5 min easy cooldown.

targets.cadence: 165–172 spm natural — don't force 180 at easy pace (§2.A)

cardio.warmup: 5 min easy build 10:30→9:45/mi, cadence building toward 165–172
cardio.cooldown: 5 min easy jog/walk, 10:30–11:00/mi, falling to Z1
cues: ≥6h gap before Hyp B; push Hyp B to Sun if the long run was hard (§2.A).
